Name: Paimon's Namecard
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Truck Expert in Mindscape Cinema
Desc2:
A card with the image of a truck printed on it.
The driver of the truck is a reliable and experienced professional. They deliver goods safely from the outer zone to the inner zone. If you need something delivered, please contact —
Reminder: Please be careful when handing over your goods. No refunds are given once the goods have been received by the delivery driver. [/INST] A card with the image of a truck printed on it.
